violations.description: Contaminated food disposition. — --Unsafe, adulterated or contaminated food was not discarded as required. Moldy cooked pork found in the walk-in cooler. Moldy food items should be discarded.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Dirty pans were found left in the hot hold cabinet since last use. Dirty equipment should be cleaned after use.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwave ovens were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling vents and tiles were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee beverage was found stored on the counter next to the hot hold wells. Personal items should be stored separate from items used in food preparation.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee touch the inside of the garbage can when moving it and he did not wash his hands. Hands should be washed after touching the garbage can.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the microwaves were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizing solution in the dish machine did not register the chlorine sanitizer used by the facility. Chlorine solutions should be at least 50ppm for sanitizing equipment.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling tiles above the food line in the kitchen were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
